heading: Eligibility for operators on heirs property land to obtain a farm number
label: 2266b Eligibility for operators on heirs property land to obtain a farm number
notes: Definition of “Secretary”“Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 115–334section 9001 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: a court order verifying the land meets the definition of heirs property (as defined in that Act); or

children.label: ii
children.text: a certification from the local recorder of deeds that the recorded owner of the land is deceased and not less than 1 heir of the recorded owner of the land has initiated a procedure to retitle the land in the name of the rightful heir;

children.label: i
children.text: has been approved by a majority of the ownership interests in that property;

children.label: ii
children.text: has given a particular owner the right to manage and control any portion or all of the land for purposes of operating a farm or ranch; and

children.label: iii
children.text: was validly entered into under the authority of the jurisdiction in which the land is located;

children.label: C
children.text: the tax return of a farm operator farming a property with undivided interests for each of the 5 years preceding the date on which the farm operator submits the tax returns as eligible documentation under subsection (b);

children.label: D
children.text: self-certification that the farm operator has control of the land for purposes of operating a farm or ranch; and

children.label: E
children.text: any other documentation identified by the Secretary under subsection (c).

children.heading: Farm number
children.label: 2 Farm number
children.text: The term “farm number” has the meaning given the term in section 718.2 of title 7, Code of Federal Regulations (as in effect on ).December 20, 2018

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall provide for the assignment of a farm number to any farm operator who provides any form of eligible documentation for purposes of demonstrating that the farm operator has control of the land for purposes of defining that land as a farm.

children.heading: Eligibility
children.label: 2 Eligibility
children.text: Any farm number provided under paragraph (1) shall be sufficient to satisfy any requirement of the Secretary to have a farm number to participate in a program of the Secretary.

children.heading: Eligible documentation
children.label: c Eligible documentation
children.text: The Secretary shall identify alternative forms of eligible documentation that a farm operator may provide in seeking the assignment of a farm number under subsection (b)(1).
